rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.1031, which governs employment of agency inspectors for school safety and security monitoring.
quote:
The agency may employ inspectors only for the purposes of:
(1) assisting the agency in monitoring school district safety and security requirements under Section 37.1083; and
(2) coordinating with local, state, and federal law enforcement during an event requiring an emergency response by a school district.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text.
